name: Erin

skills.name: Elf Dance
skills.description: Her Basic Attack grants Energy. At max Energy, she speeds up, gains a stack of Laurel, and enhances her next Basic Attack. The speed-up increases with her Magical Attack. Her Pierce and Lifesteal stats are linked, using whichever is higher.

skills.name: Dance - Leaf Greeting
skills.description: Shoots a leaf to deal damage and gain marks. The leaf then forms a circle, damaging and slowing enemies. Magical Attack reduces the skill's cooldown.

skills.name: Twirl - Forest Whisper
skills.description: Recovers full Energy and gains marks, immunity to slow, and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Waltz - Laurel Bloom
skills.description: This skill is unlocked when Erin gains enough Laurels. She consumes Laurels to deal damage and gain Movement Speed, while reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

tips: Erin (Marksman): Tier S on international ranked — 51.52% WR.
Build core: Swiftstrike Lance, Boots of the Arcane, Shadow Ripper.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.52%, pick 1.5%, ban 0.16%, popularity tier S.
Counters Ying, Han Xin, Lam · Weak into Dun.

faqs.question: Is Erin good in current season?
faqs.answer: Erin is Tier S Marksman with 51.52% win rate, 1.5% pick rate, and 0.16% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Erin build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Swiftstrike Lance, Boots of the Arcane, Shadow Ripper, Storm Sword, Eternity Blade, Bloodweeper. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Erin?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Erin: Dun. Erin is strong into Ying, Han Xin, Lam.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Ying, Han Xin, Lam. Countered by: Dun.
